city.name: Tokyo
city.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in Tokyo with OpenClaw. Built for Japan's precision-driven tech culture.
city.localFlavor: Tokyo values precision and reliability. OpenClaw delivers both - running 24/7 on infrastructure you control, with the flexibility to integrate with Japanese services and workflows.

relatedCities.name: Vienna
relatedCities.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in Vienna with OpenClaw. Perfect for Central European tech.
relatedCities.localFlavor: Vienna's tech scene values privacy and quality. OpenClaw is fully self-hosted - your data never leaves your servers. Perfect for the privacy-conscious European founder.

relatedCities.localFlavor: Austin's tech community is booming, and OpenClaw fits right in. Whether you're a startup founder on South Congress or a developer in the Domain, your AI assistant runs 24/7 on your own infrastructure.
